title: curium
description: CURE your bad Performance with this Modpack
body:
this modpack can boost your FPS and minimize stutters while also lowering the usage of your computer with sodium,indium, and other performance mods providing for a new level on smoothness when it comes to gaming.



### Constant Updates

This Modpack will keep on getting updated **untill the most popular performance mods stop producing their mods**.



### Client Only

**Curium is Client only** which means you can play on 
any server at any time.


### Main Mods

There is five mods that will be used in Curium. These
mods are Sodium,entity-culling,indium,Lithium, and ferrite-core.
The main mods are chosen for highest performance.


### Versions

Curium is only supported in 1.20+
because the best performance mods
are mainly at the best in 1.20+.
# 
You could say this can **_CURE_** your fps stutters
